creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Benjamin Laugraud wrote:

Please obtain a kernel dump via the Developers Handbook
(http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/developers-handbook/)
and reply to this message including information on there
to find the dump and the extra information mentioned in the
DevHandBook.

Without it, we cannot actually help you. Thanks for the
willingness to improve FreeBSD!

(Also note that I will reclassify this to kern instead of i386
since this is not the i386 specific probably but more generic)

-- 
Kind regards,

     Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
     FreeBSD                    ** remko@FreeBSD.org

     /* Quis custodiet ipsos custodes */
